indicators.name: large desk with dual monitors
indicators.rationale: A spacious desk with two screens is ideal for extended computer work.

indicators.name: ergonomic mesh office chair
indicators.rationale: Ergonomic seating with lumbar support is crucial for maintaining correct posture during prolonged computer work.

indicators.name: directional task lighting
indicators.rationale: Task lighting is well-positioned to reduce eye strain and is angled towards the screens.

indicators.name: bookshelf with reference materials
indicators.rationale: Reference books and organized storage indicate a dedicated knowledge work environment.

indicators.name: closed door providing privacy
indicators.rationale: Enclosed room with door enables acoustic and visual privacy essential for focused solo work.

indicators.name: dedicated low-distraction room layout
indicators.rationale: No high-traffic areas or recreational features compete for attention; the room is wholly work-oriented.

reasoning_summary: The scene is highly suitable for computer work (solo). The large desk with dual monitors, ergonomic seating, directional task lighting, reference materials, and enclosed room layout all contribute to a conducive environment for focused knowledge work.
